task_completion.description: Navigate to the Apache Webserver configuration in Webmin/Virtualmin to manage global modules.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Webmin/Virtualmin interface is visible, showing the 'Apache Webserver' section or 'Configure Apache Modules' page.
A checkbox for 'expires' or 'mod_expires' is checked in the global Apache modules list, or a success message indicates the module was enabled.

task_completion.description: Access the Apache configuration specifically for the 'acmecorp.test' virtual server.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Virtualmin interface shows 'acmecorp.test' selected, or the Apache Webserver page shows configuration for the virtual host 'acmecorp.test'.

task_completion.description: Set a default expiration policy of 1 month for the 'acmecorp.test' virtual server.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form field or directive setting in the Webmin/Virtualmin GUI showing an expiration default set to '1 month' (or 30 days) for the acmecorp.test virtual server.

task_completion.description: Check the HTTP headers of http://acmecorp.test/cache_test.css to verify the caching configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal showing a `curl -I http://acmecorp.test/cache_test.css` command (or similar) OR a browser's Developer Tools Network tab showing the response headers for `cache_test.css`. The headers must include `Cache-Control: max-age=...` or `Expires: ...`.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used Virtualmin/Webmin to perform the configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating and clicking through the Virtualmin/Webmin web interface, rather than exclusively editing Apache configuration files in a terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually checked the HTTP headers of the live URL.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a real HTTP client (like curl, wget, or a web browser's network inspector) making a request to `http://acmecorp.test/cache_test.css` and displaying the returned headers.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't fake the test file to artificially inject headers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent requests the exact `.css` file specified, without modifying the file extension or replacing it with a script (e.g., PHP) that manually injects headers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target domain: acmecorp.test. Test file: cache_test.css. Expected caching duration: 1 month. When verifying the HTTP headers, look for a Cache-Control max-age value of approximately 2592000 seconds (acceptable range is 2400000 to 2800000 seconds).
